title_en: Child suspects are being prosecuted at younger ages
title_zh: 对未成年人施加起诉年龄越来越低
rubric_en: Some governments are lowering the age of criminal responsibility. That may backfire
rubric_zh: 一些政府正在下调刑事责任年龄，这可能适得其反

paragraphs.en: “I’ll guide you,” wrote a user called Akon on Signal, an encrypted messaging app. “Pick up the guns and then take a taxi and go straight there. Like a soldier.” In October 2024, court records show, a 13-year-old boy in Gothenburg, Sweden had agreed to do a job in exchange for SKr200,000 (about $19,000 at the time). At around 7am on October 10th the boy received a YouTube tutorial on how to load a gun. Shortly after that he strode past a police car and shot at the entrance of Elbit Systems, Israel’s largest defence contractor, in broad daylight. News reports suggest the attack had been orchestrated by a Swedish drug gang with links to Iran, a year into Israel’s war in Gaza.
paragraphs.zh: 在加密聊天应用 Signal 上，一位名叫 Akon 的用户写道：“我来指挥你。” “把枪拿起来，然后打车直接去那儿。像个士兵一样。” 2024 年 10 月，法庭记录显示，一名 13 岁的瑞典哥德堡男孩为完成一桩交易而同意行动，并因此将获得 200,000 瑞典克朗（当时约合 19,000 美元）。10 月 10 日清晨约 7 点，他收到了一段关于如何装弹的 YouTube 教程。之后不久，他大摇大摆地从一辆警车旁走过，在白昼下朝以色列最大防务承包商 Elbit Systems 的入口开火。新闻报道显示，这起袭击据称是由一个与伊朗有联系的瑞典贩毒团伙策划的，而当时正值以色列对加沙战争进入第三年。

paragraphs.en: The boy was arrested almost instantly. But he was never charged, probably for the same reason he was recruited in the first place: he was below Sweden’s minimum age of criminal responsibility (MACR) of 15—the threshold at which people are deemed able to grasp the consequences of their actions, and thus punishable for them. Swedish officials are pushing to lower the MACR to 14 for serious crimes ahead of parliamentary elections in September, as voters demand a response to a spate of gang violence in recent years. In 2022 the country had one of the highest rates of gun homicides in Europe. Last year there was a wave of bomb explosions and shootings, a number of which involved children.
paragraphs.zh: 这名男孩几乎在当场就被逮捕了，但最终并未被起诉，可能正是出于他最初会被招募的同样原因：他未达到瑞典的最低刑事责任年龄（MACR）15 岁。该年龄线是界定一个人是否能够理解自己行为后果并因此受到处罚的门槛。瑞典官员正在推动在九月议会选举前将 MACR 降至 14 岁，以应对近年帮派暴力事件频发。2022 年，瑞典是欧洲枪支杀人率最高的国家之一。去年，一连串爆炸和枪击事件接连发生，其中不少案件涉及儿童。

paragraphs.en: Politicians in other countries from Brazil to the Philippines and South Korea are trying to lower their MACR, often for similar reasons (see chart). The Maldives may soon lower it from 15 to 12. Argentina this year has lowered its MACR from 16 to 14 at the behest of Javier Milei, the president. Last month Northern Ireland blocked a proposal to raise the MACR from ten, the lowest in Europe (along with England, Wales and Switzerland), to 14.
paragraphs.zh: 从巴西到菲律宾再到韩国，其他一些国家的政治人物也在试图下调自己的 MACR，动机通常相似（见图表）。马尔代夫也可能很快将其从 15 岁降到 12 岁。阿根廷今年在总统哈维尔·米莱伊主导下将 MACR 从 16 岁降至 14 岁。上个月，北爱尔兰否决了将 MACR 从 10 岁提高到 14 岁的提议，当前其起点与英格兰、威尔士和瑞士并列为欧洲最低水平。

paragraphs.en: Governments are also moving to impose tougher punishments on the children they do prosecute. Mr Milei has championed his changes with the slogan “adult crime, adult punishment”. In 2024 Queensland, Australia, passed its own “Adult Crime, Adult Time” law (then expanded it twice). Children there as young as ten can be sentenced to life in prison for murder. And starting this month in Sweden convicts as young as 15 will be imprisoned, ending a long-standing policy of detaining them in youth homes. If Sweden’s change in MACR goes through, 14-year-old criminals will go to prison, too.
paragraphs.zh: 各国政府也在对那些确实起诉的儿童实施更严厉的处罚。米莱伊以“成人犯罪，成人惩罚”为口号推动这些改革。2024 年，澳大利亚昆士兰州通过了自己的“成人犯罪，成人刑期”法案（之后又两次扩展）。在那里的儿童中，年仅 10 岁者也可能被判终身监禁。瑞典从本月起也将对年满 15 岁的罪犯执行监禁刑，终止长期以来将其羁押在少年之家中的做法。如果瑞典的 MACR 下调方案通过，14 岁的未成年人也将被送入监狱。

paragraphs.en: Officials in many of these countries are responding to rising public pressure over high-profile incidents of youth violence. In the Philippines, a 14-year-old boy was one of two teenagers accused of carrying out a school shooting in June that left three dead, prompting some politicians (though not yet Ferdinand Marcos, the president) to call for lowering the country’s MACR from 15. One of the killers was a player of GoreBox, a first-person shooter game, which the government has now banned.
paragraphs.zh: 许多国家的官员正在回应公众对高关注度青年暴力事件不断上升的压力。在菲律宾，14 岁男孩是两名被指控在6月实施一起校园枪击案的少年嫌疑人之一，该案造成三人死亡，促使一些政治人物（尽管这还不包括总统费迪南德·马科斯）呼吁将该国的最低刑事责任年龄（MACR）从 15 岁降低。凶手之一曾玩过《GoreBox》这款第一人称射击游戏，该游戏现已被政府禁止。

paragraphs.en: In Argentina in 2024, prosecutors say, someone inside a prison hired a 15-year-old gunman for 200,000 pesos ($200 at the time) to murder a petrol-station attendant—a crime that was captured on CCTV footage and shocked the country. The teen was too young to be prosecuted, provoking an outcry. Julio Burdman of Isasi/Burdman, a pollster, found 68% of people favoured lowering the MACR. “Public opinion is quite convinced that young people are the drivers of crime,” Mr Burdman says. “And that’s why politicians go after it.”
paragraphs.zh: 阿根廷检方称，2024年，一名囚犯在狱中雇用了15岁的枪手，出价20万比索（当时约200美元），要他杀害一名加油站服务员，这起犯罪被闭路电视录像完整记录，震惊全国。这名少年年龄太小，不符合起诉条件，由此引发公众愤怒。民意调查公司 Isasi/Burdman 的胡里奥·伯德曼（Julio Burdman）表示，68% 的人支持降低 MACR。“公众普遍相信年轻人是犯罪的主要推动者，”伯德曼说，“这也是政治人物追求相关改革的原因。”

paragraphs.en: The actual data on youth crimes across countries are more murky than the perception. In some countries, including Germany and Sweden, there have been reported spikes in serious crime among young people. And in South Korea the number of crimes among children under 14 nearly doubled in four years, to 21,000 last year.
paragraphs.zh: 各国关于青年犯罪的真实数据比舆论认知更为模糊。在一些国家，包括德国和瑞典，关于青少年严重犯罪有所上升的报告已经出现。在韩国，14岁以下儿童犯罪案件在四年内几乎翻了一番，去年达到21,000起。

paragraphs.en: But such rises have generally been from a relatively tiny base; in many rich countries rates of juvenile crime declined from the 1990s (when there was a previous round of get-tough-on-crime changes in law) to the 2010s. The Swedish National Council for Crime Prevention reported that in 2023 some 3,500 offences by children under 15 had been serious enough to be investigated formally, up from 1,500 in 2015. Assault was the most common offence, followed (in the case of boys) by robbery and rape. In 2025, 52 Swedish children under 15 were linked to a murder or a murder-related plot—around a third of them under 14.
paragraphs.zh: 但这些上升大多是基于一个相对较小的基数；在许多富裕国家，青少年犯罪率自1990年代（当时曾出现一轮更严厉打击犯罪的法律改革）以来，到2010年代都在下降。瑞典国家犯罪预防委员会报告称，2023年，有约3,500起由15岁以下儿童实施的犯罪案达到足够严重程度，进入正式调查程序，比2015年的1,500起有所增加。袭击是最常见的罪名，其次（就男孩而言）是抢劫和强奸。到2025年，瑞典有52名15岁以下儿童与谋杀案或谋杀相关阴谋有关联，其中约三分之一年龄在14岁以下。

paragraphs.en: How young is too young to hold a child responsible? The UN Committee on the Rights of the Child recommends a MACR of at least 14, and urges against lowering a MACR once established. Critics of lowering the age say children may not fully understand the consequences of their actions. Studies show children aged 12-14 are more impressionable, impulsive and prone to risk-taking. The brain’s pre-frontal cortex is still developing during adolescence.
paragraphs.zh: 孩子到多小才算得上“应当负责”才合适？联合国儿童权利委员会建议最低刑事责任年龄（MACR）至少为14岁，并呼吁一旦确定不应将其进一步降低。反对降低刑责年龄的观点认为，孩子可能还不能充分理解自己行为的后果。研究显示，12至14岁的儿童更容易受暗示、冲动且更倾向于冒险。大脑的前额叶在青少年阶段仍在发育中。

paragraphs.en: But politics shapes criminal-justice systems—and often that means tough-on-crime politics. England’s MACR of ten has been on the books for more than 60 years. But in 1993 the torture and murder of a two-year-old by two ten-year-old boys prompted calls to tighten the screws further on young offenders. In 1998 Tony Blair’s Labour government abolished a common-law presumption—which prosecutors had to rebut—that children aged 10-13 are doli incapax, or incapable of wrongdoing. Australia still adheres to the same prosecutorial hurdle for suspects aged 10-13 (even while Queensland seeks to punish such children like adults). In other countries high-profile crimes similarly produce constituencies for lowering the MACR; rarely does pressure go the other way.
paragraphs.zh: 但政治往往会塑造刑事司法体系，而这种塑造常常意味着“从严打击犯罪”的治安政治。英格兰将MACR定为10岁已经有六十多年了。但1993年，两个10岁男孩对一名两岁男童施虐致死，引发了进一步加重对少年犯罪分子惩罚力度的呼声。1998年，托尼·布莱尔的工党政府废除了一个普通法推定——检方原本必须证明才可推翻——即10至13岁儿童属于“行为不能归责”（doli incapax）。澳大利亚对10至13岁嫌疑人仍保留了同样的起诉门槛（尽管昆士兰州却试图像成年人一样惩处这类儿童）。在其他国家里，类似的高调犯罪也会推动民意要求下调MACR；公众压力几乎从未反向流动。

paragraphs.en: Politicians pushing to lower the MACR say they are motivated in part by the recruitment of youths into gang violence. In the Maldives, the government says that gangs in Malé, the capital, use children as young as 11 to carry out serious crimes. In Colombia authorities reported that 409 children were recruited by armed groups in 2024, up from 342 in 2023 (and probably a severe undercount, experts say).
paragraphs.zh: 主张降低MACR的政治人物部分动机是出于对青少年卷入黑帮暴力的担忧。在马尔代夫，政府称首都马累的黑帮会动用年仅11岁的儿童去实施严重犯罪。在哥伦比亚，当局报告称2024年有409名儿童被武装团体招募，较2023年的342人上升（专家称这一数字很可能严重偏低）。

paragraphs.en: In June last year, a 15-year-old Colombian boy shot a senator and presidential hopeful who died from his injuries two months later. Prosecutors said he was probably recruited by a criminal network. He was sentenced to just seven years in juvenile detention, provoking criticism that such lax punishments encourage the exploitation of minors by gangs. The UN says the longstanding problem in the country of drug-traffickers using soldaditos, or little soldiers, has been getting worse.
paragraphs.zh: 去年6月，一名15岁的哥伦比亚男孩开枪打伤一位参议员和一名总统候选人，对方两个月后因伤去世。检方称他很可能是被一个犯罪网络招募的。该少年最终仅被判处7年少年拘禁，激起了批评，认为这种过于轻缓的惩罚会助长黑帮对未成年人进行剥削。联合国表示，近年来这个国家中毒贩使用“soldaditos”（字面为“小小兵”）的长期问题正在恶化。

paragraphs.en: A report in 2025 by the European Parliament says gang recruitment is getting worse in a number of European countries as well (while noting that hard data are scarce due to shortcomings and inconsistencies in record-keeping on youth crime). The report attributes much of the rise to growing demand for recreational drugs, and finds that youths are taking part in more types of organised crime in more geographic areas than before in places like France and the Netherlands.
paragraphs.zh: 欧洲议会在2025年的一份报告指出，在一些欧洲国家，帮派招募正在恶化；报告同时说明，由于青少年犯罪记录管理存在缺陷和不一致，相关硬数据仍然稀缺。报告认为，增长中的娱乐性毒品需求是上升原因之一，并发现像法国和荷兰这样的国家，青少年参与有组织犯罪的类型更多，涉及的地理区域也比过去更广。

paragraphs.en: Inevitably this has meant more violence, too. In Marseille, where gangs are hiring adolescents as police-spotters, the report says, there have been cases of children “harming innocent bystanders or killing each other with Kalashnikovs”.
paragraphs.zh: 这不可避免地也带来了更多暴力。在马赛，报告称帮派在雇佣青少年当“警察监视员”，并出现了儿童“伤害无辜围观者，或用卡拉什尼科夫步枪互相杀害”的案例。

paragraphs.en: In Sweden, like in Argentina, the Maldives and elsewhere, government officials argue that lowering the MACR will let police not only improve public safety, but also help children who have gone astray by intervening earlier in their lives. To the extent that their age made them targets for recruitment, the argument goes, it may also spare some children from organised-crime recruitment.
paragraphs.zh: 在瑞典、阿根廷、马尔代夫等地，政府官员认为，降低MACR（最低刑事责任年龄）不仅能帮助警方提升公共安全，还能让偏离轨道的儿童更早接受干预，从而得到帮助。按照他们的逻辑，若将年龄门槛降得更低，在一定程度上也能使一些因年龄而成为招募目标的儿童免受有组织犯罪招募。

paragraphs.en: But those who oppose lowering the MACR—including, in Sweden, the prison service, the bar association and an independent body of senior judges—fear the opposite will happen instead. In England and Wales, where the MACR is just ten, gangs recruit children as young as seven. “Gangs are going lower and lower,” says Gabriel Wessman, director of Rosersberg prison north of Stockholm.
paragraphs.zh: 但反对降低MACR的人士——包括在瑞典的监狱管理机构、律师协会以及一个由高级法官组成的独立机构——担心结果恰好相反。在英格兰和威尔士，MACR只有十岁，帮派甚至会招募低至七岁的儿童。“帮派在不断走得更低，”斯德哥尔摩以北的罗斯堡监狱（Rosersberg prison）监狱长加布里埃尔·韦斯曼（Gabriel Wessman）说。

paragraphs.en: Lowering the MACR can also do lasting harm to the children who get locked up. In 2010 Denmark, which was then enduring a wave of gang-related violence similar to Sweden’s, experimented with lowering the age from 15 to 14. Two years later the change was reversed under a new government. Authorities determined that lowering the MACR had actually led to an increase in crime: criminalising younger children increased the likelihood of their reoffending within 18 months of release. (Similarly, in England and Wales two-thirds of children aged 10-17 who served custodial sentences of under a year end up reoffending within a year of their release.)
paragraphs.zh: 降低 MACR（刑事责任最低年龄）也可能长期伤害被关押的儿童。2010 年，丹麦当时正在经历一轮与瑞典相似的帮派暴力浪潮，于是试行将年龄从 15 岁降到 14 岁。两年后，在新政府上台后，这一变更被撤回。执法部门认定，降低 MACR 实际上导致犯罪率上升：更早地将儿童定性为犯罪者，使其在出狱后 18 个月内再次犯罪的概率增加。（同样，在英格兰和威尔士，三分之二年龄在 10 到 17 岁、监禁期不足一年的儿童，在释放一年内再次犯罪。）

paragraphs.en: However governments tweak their laws, gangs will find a way to hire young shooters like the 13-year-old in Gothenburg. Narcos in Latin America and gangs in Britain alike target children on Instagram and TikTok, massively widening their pool of recruits. “They can take the children that we recruit, but in one second I will put something new on Instagram, and I will recruit hundreds of children again,” one recruiter told Evin Cetin, a co-author of “Child Soldiers: How Gangs Kidnap Our Future”.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，无论各国如何调整法律，帮派都会设法招募像哥德堡那名 13 岁孩子那样的“枪手”。拉丁美洲的贩毒集团和英国的帮派都在 Instagram 与 TikTok 上锁定儿童，极大扩大了他们的招募池。一名招募者在接受作家 Evin Cetin——《Child Soldiers: How Gangs Kidnap Our Future》的联合作者——采访时说：“他们会继续招募我们招来的孩子，但只要我在 Instagram 上发一条新内容，就能再招到上百个孩子。”

paragraphs.en: Sweden is an example of how shrewdly—and quickly—criminals can adapt to changes in the law and inflict the consequences on the young. In 2022, as gang crimes hit their peak, the government toughened a measure that gave anyone under 20 years old a “discount” on their prison sentence, lowering that threshold to under 18. Gangs quickly accelerated the recruitment of younger people online, asking them to send a photo of their passports or of their relatives’ passports before they carried out a crime. That locked them in for fear of reprisals if they got cold feet.
paragraphs.zh: 瑞典是犯罪分子如何机敏且快速地适应法律变化并把后果转嫁给年轻人的一个例子。2022 年，随着帮派犯罪达到高峰，瑞典政府收紧了一项对 20 岁以下所有人监禁刑给予“减刑”的规定，将该年龄门槛下调至 18 岁以下。帮派很快在线上加速招募更年轻的人，要求他们在实施犯罪前先提供自己的护照照片或其亲属护照照片。这让这些未成年人因担心招供后遭到报复而不敢临阵退缩。

paragraphs.en: The case of the Elbit Systems shooting remains a telltale example of who gets punished and who often does not in organised crime. Four other teenagers, ranging in age from 15 to 19, were eventually sentenced to prison for their roles in the crime, including the recruitment of the 13-year-old boy. But not “Akon”, the person who appears to have been the mastermind. He was never identified. ■
paragraphs.zh: 埃尔比特系统枪击案恰好说明了有组织犯罪中谁会受到惩罚、谁往往不会被追责。“13 岁男孩”所涉案事件中，另外四名青少年（年龄在 15 到 19 岁之间）最终被判监禁，包括那位参与招募 13 岁少年的人。但“阿肯”——那个看起来像是幕后策划者的人——始终没有被认出。■
